steps.title: Identify the signal in context
steps.content: The passage presents "producing acclaimed works" as the means by which Gary Pak establishes his place in the literary tradition. This phrase signals positive achievement—something that would naturally make one's position secure and firm.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the signal
steps.content:
The blank needs a verb meaning "to firmly establish" — by producing acclaimed works, Pak has earned/established his place in the tradition. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — contemplated: thought about; you contemplate ideas, not your literary placement. ✗
  • Choice B — subverted: undermined; this would mean Pak is challenging the tradition, but he is JOINING it through acclaimed work. ✗
  • Choice C — solidified: firmly established; acclaimed works confirm and strengthen Pak's place in the tradition. ✓
  • Choice D — extricated: removed from; Pak isn't leaving the tradition, he's joining it. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
